   <item>
      <title>Keaton Wagler Declares For 2026 NBA Draft</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285053/Keaton-Wagler-Declares-For-2026-NBA-Draft</link>
      <description><p>Illinois guard Keaton Wagler has declared as an Early Entry Candidate for the 2026 NBA Draft. Wagler is currently ranked fifth on ESPN's Top 100 prospects for this year's draft.</p>
<p>Wagler played in 37 games in his lone season for the Fighting Illini. The 6-foot-6 guard averaged 17.9 points, 5.1 rebounds and 4.2 assists as a freshman. Wagler also put up 44.5/39.7/79.6 shooting splits.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 20:42:52 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285053/Keaton-Wagler-Declares-For-2026-NBA-Draft</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Wagler_Keaton_il_260316.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Nuggets To Sit Most Of Rotation Sunday; Nikola Jokic Questionable With Award Eligibility At Stake</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285054/Nuggets-To-Sit-Most-Of-Rotation-Sunday;-Nikola-Jokic-Questionable-With-Award-Eligibility-At-Stake</link>
      <description><p>The Denver Nuggets again ruled out most of their regular rotation Sunday against the San Antonio Spurs, but three-time MVP Nikola Jokic remains questionable. Jokic needs at least 15 minutes to secure eligibility for postseason awards.</p>
<p>Denver enters Sunday as the No. 3 seed in the Western Conference at 53-28. A loss, combined with a Los Angeles Lakers win over the Utah Jazz, would drop the Nuggets to the No. 4 seed. The Lakers hold the tiebreaker over Denver following an overtime victory last month.</p>
<p>The seeding difference carries significant playoff implications. As the No. 3 seed, Denver would face the Minnesota Timberwolves in the first round. A slide to No. 4 would instead send them against the Houston Rockets.</p>
<p>The Nuggets will be without Jamal Murray, Aaron Gordon, Cameron Johnson, Christian Braun and Tim Hardaway Jr. on Sunday. Peyton Watson and Spencer Jones remain sidelined as well with right hamstring strains.</p>
<p>The Spurs listed Victor Wembanyama, Stephon Castle and Devin Vassell as questionable. Wembanyama already secured his award eligibility by playing Friday. The Spurs are locked into the No. 2 seed but could influence Denver's bracket placement with a victory.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 22:48:32 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285054/Nuggets-To-Sit-Most-Of-Rotation-Sunday;-Nikola-Jokic-Questionable-With-Award-Eligibility-At-Stake</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Jokic_Nikola_den_250130.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Stephen Curry Tweaks Ankle In Loss To Kings, Expects To Play Sunday</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285050/Stephen-Curry-Tweaks-Ankle-In-Loss-To-Kings-Expects-To-Play-Sunday</link>
      <description><p>Stephen Curry suffered an ankle scare Friday during the Golden State Warriors' 124-118 loss to the Sacramento Kings, but expects to be healthy for Wednesday's 9/10 Play-In game, which will likely be against the Los Angeles Clippers. The 38-year-old guard slipped on a wet spot on the floor with just over nine minutes remaining in the first quarter, coming up hobbling and sending concern through the building.</p>
<p>Steve Kerr immediately called timeout and watched Curry consult with Warriors VP of player health and performance Rick Celebrini on the bench. Curry returned to the game shortly after.</p>
<p>"He's doing fine," Kerr said. "It was his ankle, it wasn't his knee. That's why I took the timeout. I was worried it was his knee. I just saw him limping and he came over and said, 'No, I'm fine. It's just the ankle.' He just tweaked it or something but he's fine."</p>
<p>Curry finished with 11 points on 3-of-8 shooting in 27 minutes, appearing uncomfortable through much of the first half before finding better rhythm after the break. He spent time with his ankle in an ice bucket postgame and received additional treatment from the training staff.</p>
<p>The context makes the injury particularly nerve-wracking. Curry is playing in just his third game back after missing more than two months with a runner's knee injury.</p>
<p>"As long as it's not my knee, I can deal with ankles," Curry said. "My knee felt pretty good, even better than last game, so I'll take that as a positive."</p>
<p>Kerr confirmed the plan is for Curry to play Sunday's regular-season finale against the Clippers. Curry said he is targeting 30-32 minutes to build rhythm ahead of Wednesday's winner-take-all play-in matchup.</p>
<p>"I'll be comfortable with it," Curry said. "I find it hard to believe that if the game calls for a couple extra minutes that we won't make the right decision there."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 14:20:18 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285050/Stephen-Curry-Tweaks-Ankle-In-Loss-To-Kings-Expects-To-Play-Sunday</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Curry_Stephen_gsw_241227.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Victor Wembanyama Scores 40 Points In Game He Only Played To Meet 65-Game Award Rule</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285044/Victor-Wembanyama-Scores-40-Points-In-Game-He-Only-Played-To-Meet-65-Game-Award-Rule</link>
      <description><p>Victor Wembanyama played in Friday's game against the Dallas Mavericks after suffering an injury earlier in the week for the primary purpose of reaching the 65-game threshold required for regular season award eligibility. He accomplished that, came out of the game but then returned, <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/nba/daily-leaders/2026-04-10">finishing with 40 points and 13 rebounds in only 26 minutes</a>.</p>
<p>The San Antonio Spurs star was pulled after hitting exactly 20 minutes, the minimum required for the game to count toward eligibility. He then returned to the floor, apparently persuading the Spurs he wanted more time.</p>
<p>"If I had 65 [games] before, I for sure wouldn't have played," Wembanyama said.</p>
<p>The appearance was Wembanyama's 64th regular-season contest, but his participation in <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/nba/boxscore/2025-12-16/San-Antonio-at-New-York/503575">the NBA Cup final</a> counts toward award eligibility despite not appearing in official season statistics, pushing him to the required mark.</p>
<p>Wembanyama had been sidelined Wednesday after suffering a left rib contusion colliding with Paul George during Monday's win over the Philadelphia 76ers. He returned Friday contingent on a clean pregame warmup.</p>
<p>After securing his eligibility, Wembanyama weighed in on the 65-game rule itself, and held an impromptu math session with reporters, suggesting 75 percent of the schedule, roughly 62 games, would be a more logical standard than the current threshold.</p>
<p>"In my opinion, it's good to have a threshold, a limit," he said. "Where do we need to put it? I don't know. It's a good question."</p>
<p>Wembanyama then took over the news conference, turning the question back on the reporters in the room.</p>
<p>"Let me ask you a question," Wembanyama said. "What percentage of the season do you think should be the limit?"</p>
<p>After reporters offered figures ranging from two-thirds to 80 percent, Wembanyama worked through the numbers himself.</p>
<p>"If a guy plays 50 games, 35 minutes a game, that's 50 times 35 - that's 1,750, right? Am I right?" he said. "If a guy plays 75 games at 20 minutes, it's 1,500. So it's a good view, in my opinion, to not have a limit. It's one opinion. Seventy-five percent of the games, in my opinion, would be a logical thing, and that would be 61 1/2 games, right? So, 62 games."</p>
<p>When a reporter confirmed his math, the room laughed. "Of course, the alien gets all of it right," another reporter said.</p>
<p>Wembanyama also acknowledged the broader stakes of the rule, noting that Cade Cunningham, Luka Doncic and Anthony Edwards will all fall short of the threshold this season.</p>
<p>"I think, obviously, I don't think there's going to be an exception made for this year," he said. "I think it'd be somewhat unfair, but we'll see how it turns out."</p>
<p>Wembanyama is the consensus favorite for Defensive Player of the Year and a first-team All-NBA selection. He remains <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/betting/news/nba-mvp-betting-odds/">a leading MVP candidate</a>, though <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284871/Shai-Gilgeous-Alexander-Maintains-Sizable-NBA-MVP-Straw-Poll-Lead-Over-Victor-Wembanyama">an ESPN straw poll of 100 media members showed Shai Gilgeous-Alexander holding an 88-to-nowhere lead in first-place votes</a>. San Antonio enters the playoffs as the No. 2 seed at 62-19.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 07:43:24 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285044/Victor-Wembanyama-Scores-40-Points-In-Game-He-Only-Played-To-Meet-65-Game-Award-Rule</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Wembanyama_Victor_sas_240516.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>OG Anunoby Exits Knicks Win Early Due To Left Ankle Injury</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285046/OG-Anunoby-Exits-Knicks-Win-Early-Due-To-Left-Ankle-Injury</link>
      <description><p>The New York Knicks wrapped up the #3 seed in the Eastern Conference Playoffs with a win over the Toronto Raptors on Friday. However, that might have been a costly victory for New York, as OG Anunoby suffered a left ankle injury.</p>
<p>Anunoby tripped over Scottie Barnes while contesting a shot early in the second quarter. The Knicks forward appeared to roll his left ankle. He stayed in for a few more plays, but exited for the night shortly thereafter. Anunoby then missed the entire second half.</p>
<p>Knicks coach Mike Brown had no updates on Anunoby postgame. The veteran combo forward missed 13 games this season due to a strained hamstring and later a lost toenail. The Knicks have nothing to play for on Sunday, which should allow Anunoby more than a week's rest until the first round of the playoffs starts the following weekend.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 09:09:02 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285046/OG-Anunoby-Exits-Knicks-Win-Early-Due-To-Left-Ankle-Injury</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Anuoby_OG_nyk_240102.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Dusty May Agrees To New Deal With Michigan</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285051/Dusty-May-Agrees-To-New-Deal-With-Michigan</link>
      <description><p>Michigan coach Dusty May has agreed on a deal that will have him continuing to lead the Wolverines "for many years to come," athletic director Warde Manuel said Saturday.</p>
<p>Manuel made the comment during a ceremony celebrating Michigan's NCAA tournament championship.</p>
<p>"Dusty and I have already reached an agreement," Manuel said in a remark that resulted in a standing ovation as well as chants of "Dusty!" from the crowd that had gathered at the Crisler Center.</p>
<p>Manuel then finished his comment: "And he will be the leader of this basketball team for many years to come."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 17:16:01 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285051/Dusty-May-Agrees-To-New-Deal-With-Michigan</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/May_Dusty_mich_260316.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Dalano Banton, Celtics Agree To Two-Year Contract</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285048/Dalano-Banton-Celtics-Agree-To-Two-Year-Contract</link>
      <description><p>The Boston Celtics are signing guard Dalano Banton to a two-year contract. Banton will fill Boston's 15th standard roster spot going into the playoffs.</p>
<p>The Celtics timed things down to the day to fill out their roster, while also finishing the season under the luxury tax. Boston will avoid the tax by about $11 thousand dollars. That, combined with getting under the second apron, will go a long way towards the team resetting the penalties that come with being over the second apron and being a tax repeater.</p>
<p>Banton has had two previous stints with the Celtics. He spent half of the season with Boston in 2023-24 and then was with the Celtics on a 10 Day contract earlier this season.</p>
<p>The 6-foot-8 guard has spent most of this season with the Texas Legends of the G League. In 44 G League games, Banton has averaged 24.9 points, 4.1 rebounds, 6.9 assists, 1.1 blocks and a steal per game.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 11:20:57 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285048/Dalano-Banton-Celtics-Agree-To-Two-Year-Contract</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_bostonceltics.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Raptors Convert AJ Lawson To Standard Contract</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285052/Raptors-Convert-AJ-Lawson-To-Standard-Contract</link>
      <description><p>The Toronto Raptors are converting wing A.J. Lawson from his two-way contract to a standard contract for the remainder of the season. This will make Lawson eligible for the postseason for Toronto.</p>
<p>Lawson has appeared in 23 games for Toronto this season. The 6-foot-6 wing has averaged 4.0 points in 9.4 minutes per game for the Raptors. Lawson has shot 41.5% from behind the arc in his limited minutes in the NBA this season.</p>
<p>Toronto now has a full roster as they head into the postseason. If the Raptors win on Sunday, they'll secure a top-six seed and a playoff spot. It Toronto loses, they could finish anywhere from sixth to eighth place in the Eastern Conference, depending on the results of other games.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 20:38:22 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285052/Raptors-Convert-AJ-Lawson-To-Standard-Contract</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Lawson_AJ_tor_260406.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Heat Convert Jahmir Young To Standard NBA Contract</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285042/Heat-Convert-Jahmir-Young-To-Standard-NBA-Contract</link>
      <description><p>The Miami Heat are converting Jahmir Young's two-way contract to a two-year, standard NBA deal, sources told Shams Charania of ESPN.</p>
<p>The <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285030/Heat-Waiving-Terry-Rozier">Heat waived Terry Rozier</a> earlier on Friday, creating the roster spot for Young.</p>
<p>Young's salary for next season will be non-guaranteed.</p>
<p>Young will now be eligible for the postseason.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 01:27:53 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285042/Heat-Convert-Jahmir-Young-To-Standard-NBA-Contract</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_miamiheat.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Hayden Gray, Jazz Signing Two-Year Contract</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285047/Hayden-Gray-Jazz-Signing-Two-Year-Contract</link>
      <description><p>The Utah Jazz are signing guard Hayden Gray to a two-year contract. Gray spent this season playing for the Maine Celtics of the G League.</p>
<p>Gray appeared in 48 games for Maine with 23 starts. The 6-foot-4 guard averaged 9.9 points, 2.8 rebounds, 5.8 assists and 2.1 steals in 27.9 minutes per game.</p>
<p>This signing will bring the Jazz back to the maximum of 15 players on standard contracts. Kennedy Chandler's second 10 Day contract with Utah expired after Friday's game.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 10:13:26 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285047/Hayden-Gray-Jazz-Signing-Two-Year-Contract</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_utahjazz.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Swarm Win G League Finals; Tosan Evbuomwan Named MVP</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285045/Swarm-Win-G-League-Finals;-Tosan-Evbuomwan-Named-MVP</link>
      <description><p>The Greensboro Swarm won the G League title for the first time in franchise history. The Swarm defeated the Stockton Kings 2-0 in the best-of-three G League Finals.</p>
<p>Forward Tosan Evbuomwan was named MVP after scoring 22 points in the clinching game. Evbuomwan is on a two-way contract with the Swam and the Charlotte Hornets.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 08:56:50 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285045/Swarm-Win-G-League-Finals;-Tosan-Evbuomwan-Named-MVP</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/gleague_greensboroswarm.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Satou Sabally, Jonquel Jones Sign Multiyear Deals With Liberty</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285049/Satou-Sabally-Jonquel-Jones-Sign-Multiyear-Deals-With-Liberty</link>
      <description><p>Satou Sabally has agreed to a multiyear deal with the New York Liberty, her agent Zack Miller of WME Basketball confirmed to ESPN. Center Jonquel Jones also agreed to return to New York on a multiyear contract, a separate source confirmed.</p>
<p>Sabally's decision was driven by New York's championship culture and her belief the Liberty remain legitimate title contenders, a source told ESPN. The Liberty won the 2025 WNBA championship.</p>
<p>The 27-year-old forward averaged 16.3 points, 5.9 rebounds, 2.5 assists and 1.3 steals for the Phoenix Mercury last season, earning her third All-Star Game selection. She averaged 19 points and 7 rebounds in the postseason before suffering a concussion in Game 3 of the WNBA Finals that forced her to miss the decisive final game. Lingering symptoms kept her out of Unrivaled in January.</p>
<p>Sabally's arrival reunites her with Liberty guard Sabrina Ionescu, her former Oregon teammate. The pair led Oregon to the program's first Final Four in 2019 before being selected first and second overall in the 2020 WNBA Draft. Ionescu has indicated she intends to re-sign with New York, joining Breanna Stewart in announcing plans to return.</p>
<p>Sabally also reunites with teammate Leonie Fiebich, with whom she played at Valencia Basket during previous WNBA offseasons.</p>
<p>Jones, a five-time All-Star, is entering her fourth season in New York after spending her first six years with the Connecticut Sun. She averaged 13.6 points, 8.1 rebounds and 2.7 assists in 2025 but appeared in just 31 of 44 games due to ankle injuries. Jones made WNBA history in 2021 as the first player to win MVP, Sixth Woman of the Year and Most Improved Player.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 14:15:08 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285049/Satou-Sabally-Jonquel-Jones-Sign-Multiyear-Deals-With-Liberty</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_newyorkliberty.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Joel Embiid Out Of Hospital, No Timetable For Return</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285043/Joel-Embiid-Out-Of-Hospital-No-Timetable-For-Return</link>
      <description><p>Joel Embiid was discharged from a Houston-area hospital on Friday after <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285016/Joel-Embiid-Undergoes-Appendectomy">undergoing an appendectomy</a> on Thursday.</p>
<p>There is no timetable for Embiid's return.</p>
<p>"It is a tough blow," coach Nick Nurse said. "I think that the biggest thing right now is that Joel comes out of the surgery as best as possible and all that goes well. That's where most of my thoughts are right now."</p>
<p>The Sixers are currently in eighth place in the Eastern Conference with one game left in the season.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 01:41:48 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285043/Joel-Embiid-Out-Of-Hospital-No-Timetable-For-Return</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Embiid_Joel_phi_260406.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Brittney Griner Set To Join Sun On Seven-Figure Deal</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285041/Brittney-Griner-Set-To-Join-Sun-On-Seven-Figure-Deal</link>
      <description><p>Brittney Griner is finalizing a seven-figure deal with the Connecticut Sun, sources told Alexa Philippou of ESPN.</p>
<p>Griner, who had spent her entire career with the Mercury, averaged 9.8 points and 5.2 rebounds for the Dream last season.</p>
<p>The 35-year-old is a six-time WNBA All-Star.</p>
<p>The team is <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284720/Sun-Sold-To-Fertitta-Family-Will-Move-To-Houston-In-2027">set to move to Houston</a> for the 2027 season. Griner is from the city and played college at Baylor. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sat, 11 Apr 2026 01:21:05 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285041/Brittney-Griner-Set-To-Join-Sun-On-Seven-Figure-Deal</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_connecticutsun.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Nneka Ogwumike Chooses Sparks Over Lynx In Free Agency</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285040/Nneka-Ogwumike-Chooses-Sparks-Over-Lynx-In-Free-Agency</link>
      <description><p>Nneka Ogwumike has agreed to rejoin the Los Angeles Sparks after two seasons with the Seattle Storm. The news was first reported by her sister, Chiney Ogwumike, an ESPN analyst.</p>
<p>Ogwumike also visited the Minnesota Lynx before settling on a return to Los Angeles as she enters her 15th professional season. Ogwumike is a 10-time All-Star. </p>
<p>The veteran forward spent her first 12 seasons with the Sparks before departing for Seattle ahead of the 2024 campaign. Last season she averaged 18 points, 7 rebounds, and 2 assists while shooting 51 percent from the floor in 31 minutes per game.</p>
<p>Ogwumike's most decorated season in Los Angeles came in 2016, when the Sparks claimed the WNBA championship and she earned league MVP honors, posting career bests across points, rebounds, assists, and shooting percentage.</p>
<p>Her return gives second-year coach Lynne Roberts a proven veteran anchor. The Sparks have already retained guard Kelsey Plum on a core designation and hold no first-round draft pick, signaling a roster built around experienced players.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 22:39:25 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285040/Nneka-Ogwumike-Chooses-Sparks-Over-Lynx-In-Free-Agency</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_losangelessparks.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Arike Ogunbowale Takes Below-Supermax Deal To Stay With Wings</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285039/Arike-Ogunbowale-Takes-Below-Supermax-Deal-To-Stay-With-Wings</link>
      <description><p>Arike Ogunbowale is returning to the Dallas Wings on a multiyear, seven-figure contract, sources told ESPN Friday. The four-time WNBA All-Star opted for below the available $1.4 million supermax to allow the franchise flexibility in building a competitive roster around her.</p>
<p>The Wings had extended Ogunbowale a core qualifying offer earlier this week. She was selected by Dallas with the fifth overall pick in 2019 out of Notre Dame and remains committed to the city and franchise.</p>
<p>During her tenure with the Wings, Ogunbowale has earned three All-WNBA selections, two All-Star Game MVP awards, and led the league in scoring in 2020. She averaged at least 18.7 points per game in every season prior to 2025, when she posted a career-low 15.5 points along with 4.1 assists and 2.5 rebounds as Dallas finished last in the standings.</p>
<p>With new head coach Jose Fernandez leading the team, Dallas holds the No. 1 pick in Monday's collegiate draft and figures to pair Ogunbowale with 2025 top selection Paige Bueckers as the core of a playoff push.</p>
<p>Ogunbowale also claimed an Unrivaled title with Mist B.C. during the offseason.</p>
<p>In a separate move, forward Jessica Shepard has agreed to a multiyear deal with Dallas, sources told ESPN. Shepard, Ogunbowale's former Notre Dame teammate and national championship partner, spent five seasons with the Minnesota Lynx after being drafted in 2019. The 6-foot-4 forward averaged 8.0 points, 7.3 rebounds, and 2.6 assists off the bench in 2025.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 22:33:45 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285039/Arike-Ogunbowale-Takes-Below-Supermax-Deal-To-Stay-With-Wings</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_dallaswings.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Kelsey Mitchell, Fever Sign One-Year, $1.4M Supermax</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285038/Kelsey-Mitchell-Fever-Sign-One-Year-$14M-Supermax</link>
      <description><p>Kelsey Mitchell and the Indiana Fever have agreed to a one-year, $1.4 million supermax agreement.</p>
<p>Mitchell was an All-WNBA selection in 2025, helping the Fever into the WNBA semifinals despite the injury absence of Caitlin Clark and Sophie Cunningham. Mitchell finished fifth in MVP voting.</p>
<p>Mitchell became the first Fever player to average 20 points in the regular season to go with 1.8 rebounds and 3.4 assists. Mitchell had a PER of 19.9. </p>
<p>The Fever selected Mitchell with the second overall pick in the 2018 draft out of Ohio State. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 22:22:47 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285038/Kelsey-Mitchell-Fever-Sign-One-Year-$14M-Supermax</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_indianafever.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Chelsea Gray, Aces Sign Three-Year, $3M Deal</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285037/Chelsea-Gray-Aces-Sign-Three-Year-$3M-Deal</link>
      <description><p>Chelsea Gray has agreed to a three-year, $3 million fully guaranteed deal to return to the Las Vegas Aces. Gray averaged 11.2 points, 5.4 rebounds and 3.9 assists in 2025 while helping Las Vegas to its third title in four years.</p>
<p>Gray was named MVP of the WNBA Finals in 2022.</p>
<p>Gray is a six-time All-Star and was the 11th overall pick in the 2014 draft out of Duke.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 22:14:54 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285037/Chelsea-Gray-Aces-Sign-Three-Year-$3M-Deal</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/wnba_lasvegasaces.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>76ers Convert Daley Terry To Standard NBA Contract, Waive Cameron Payne</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285036/76ers-Convert-Daley-Terry-To-Standard-NBA-Contract-Waive-Cameron-Payne</link>
      <description><p>The Philadelphia 76ers have converted guard Daley Terry from a Two-Way contract to a standard NBA deal.</p>
<p>Terry signed his original Two-Way agreement on February 10. In 13 appearances for Philadelphia, he averaged 4.3 points, 1.8 assists, and 1.5 rebounds across 13.0 minutes per game.</p>
<p>In three games with the Delaware Blue Coats, Terry posted 20.0 points, 4.3 rebounds, and 4.0 assists per contest.</p>
<p>The Chicago Bulls selected Terry with the 18th overall in the 2022 NBA Draft. Over four seasons and 204 games in Chicago, he averaged 3.5 points, 1.7 rebounds, and 1.2 assists. He reached double figures in scoring 18 times, including a career-best 17 points on 6-of-8 shooting against Philadelphia on February 24, 2025.</p>
<p>In a corresponding roster move, the 76ers placed guard Cameron Payne on waivers. Payne appeared in 22 games this season, contributing 7.4 points, 2.6 assists, 2.0 rebounds, and 1.1 steals in 17.0 minutes per game.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 22:00:12 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285036/76ers-Convert-Daley-Terry-To-Standard-NBA-Contract-Waive-Cameron-Payne</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_philadelphiasixers.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Lucas Williamson, Grizzlies Sign 2nd 10-Day Contract</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285034/Lucas-Williamson-Grizzlies-Sign-2nd-10-Day-Contract</link>
      <description><p>The Memphis Grizzlies have signed wing Lucas Williamson to a second 10-Day contract.</p>
<p>Williamson (6-4, 205) has appeared in five games (one start) and has averaged 9.0 points, 3.8 rebounds and 2.4 assists in 28.2 minutes since signing his first 10-Day contract on March 31. The 27-year-old has averaged 16.5 points in his last two games.</p>
<p>Williamson competed in 46 games (15 starts) for the Memphis Hustle and Windy City Bulls during the 2025-26 NBA G League Tip-Off Tournament and regular season and averaged 7.2 points in 23.7 minutes.</p>
<p>Williamson went unselected in the 2022 NBA Draft following five years at Loyola Chicago, where he was named the Missouri Valley Conference Defensive Player of the Year twice (2021, 2022) and led the Ramblers to the 2018 NCAA Final Four.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 17:32:57 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285034/Lucas-Williamson-Grizzlies-Sign-2nd-10-Day-Contract</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_memphisgrizzlies.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Tyreke Key Waived By Raptors</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285033/Tyreke-Key-Waived-By-Raptors</link>
      <description><p>The Toronto Raptors have waived guard Tyreke Key.</p>
<p>Key averaged 14.9 points, 2.5 rebounds, 1.7 assists and 24.5 minutes in 47 games (16 starts) with Raptors 905 in the NBA G League this season.</p>
<p>Key helped the 905 earn the number one seed in the league's Tip-Off Tournament, reach the 2025 G League Winter Showcase Final and secure a playoff berth. Key signed with the Raptors on Apr. 6.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 13:30:25 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285033/Tyreke-Key-Waived-By-Raptors</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_torontoraptors.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Lakers Waive Kobe Bufkin</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285032/Lakers-Waive-Kobe-Bufkin</link>
      <description><p>The Los Angeles Lakers have waived guard Kobe Bufkin from his two-year deal. The Lakers are opening a roster spot ahead of the playoffs to evaluate another signing. </p>
<p>Bufkin appeared in 16 games with the Lakers, averaging 2.9 points in 7.5 minutes.</p>
<p>Bufkin was the 15th overall pick in the 2023 draft out of Michigan.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 13:28:53 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285032/Lakers-Waive-Kobe-Bufkin</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/nba_losangeleslakers.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Dunc'd On: MVP and All-NBA; This Just In</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285031/Duncd-On-MVP-and-All-NBA;-This-Just-In</link>
      <description><p><iframe src="https://player.simplecast.com/31e9cf69-f2f2-4746-a4ad-20c0df8b8f63?dark=false" width="100%" height="200px" frameborder="no" scrolling="no" seamless="" data-mce-fragment="1"></iframe></p>
<div class="episode-long-desc" data-v-abc7255a="" data-v-17ef938d="">
<p>Who should be the MVP between Shai, Jokic, Wembanyama, and Luka? Who would have made All-NBA if not for the dreaded 65-game rule?  We pick our teams both with and without the rule.</p>
<p>Then, we catch up on Thursday's action and set the scene for the weekend scenarios. Are we headed towards a fantastic San Antonio/Denver game on Sunday?</p>
</div>
<div class="episode-long-desc" data-v-abc7255a="" data-v-17ef938d="">

It's the only place to get every episode with Nate & Danny, plus every pod with John Hollinger & Nate as well!</p>

<p>Or, sign up for our FREE mailing list to get <a href="https://supportingcast.us17.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=dccd41580f4391a31c00ca695&id=52b46b92ee">Dan Feldman's Daily Duncs</a> with all the major topics around the league twice a week.</p>
</div></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 10:26:37 EDT</pubDate>

   <item>
      <title>Heat Waiving Terry Rozier</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285030/Heat-Waiving-Terry-Rozier</link>
      <description><p>The Miami Heat are waiving guard Terry Rozier on Friday. Rozier has been out all season while be investigated for his involvement in a gambling scandal.</p>
<p>Rozier's contract is fully guaranteed for $26.6 million. That amount will go on Miami's books as dead money. After having his salary initially held in escrow, Rozier has been paid on his regular pay schedule by the Heat.</p>
<p>By waiving Rozier, Miami will open a roster spot ahead of the 2026 postseason. The Heat are locked into a spot in the Eastern Conference Play-In Tournament.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 09:47:49 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285030/Heat-Waiving-Terry-Rozier</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Rozier_Terry_mia_240226.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Shaedon Sharpe, Vit Krejci Eyeing Returns For End of Regular Season</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285029/Shaedon-Sharpe-Vit-Krejci-Eyeing-Returns-For-End-of-Regular-Season</link>
      <description><p>The Portland Trail Blazers may be getting some reinforcements back at the end of the regular season and ahead of the Western Conference Play-In Tournament. Shaedon Sharpe and Vit Krejci were both upgraded to questionable for Friday's game against the LA Clippers. That contest will go a long way towards deciding which team is #8 and #9 seeds in the Play-In Tournament.</p>
<p>Sharpe has been out since February 6 with a stress reaction in his right fibula. Krejci hasn't played since March 15 due to a left calf contusion.</p>
<p>If Sharpe and Krejci are able to return, the Blazers will be about as healthy as they have been all season long. Only Jerami Grant is sideline due to a calf strain, of players to play for Portland this season.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 09:23:58 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285029/Shaedon-Sharpe-Vit-Krejci-Eyeing-Returns-For-End-of-Regular-Season</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Sharpe_Shaedon_por_221114.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>LeBron James Dealing With Right Hand Injury</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285028/LeBron-James-Dealing-With-Right-Hand-Injury</link>
      <description><p>The Los Angeles Lakers injury-ravaged close to the season continued on Thursday. LeBron James aggravated a right hand injury in the win over the Golden State Warriors. Postgame, James said he's been dealing with the injury for a while now and feels it when he hits the hand in certain ways.</p>
<p>James appeared to re-ding the injury when making a chase-down block midway through the third quarter. Lakers guard Luke Kennard also injured his hand on the play when swiping for the ball. Both James and Kennard returned to the game before exiting midway through the fourth quarter with Los Angeles holding a big lead.</p>
<p>James downplayed the injury postgame by saying, "It'll be fine. I mean it's not fine, but I'm good."</p>
<p> </p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 09:16:49 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285028/LeBron-James-Dealing-With-Right-Hand-Injury</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/James_LeBron_lal_260212.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Azzi Fudd Slides To No. 4 In Final WNBA Mock Draft; Awa Fam Holds Top Spot</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285027/Azzi-Fudd-Slides-To-No-4-In-Final-WNBA-Mock-Draft;-Awa-Fam-Holds-Top-Spot</link>
      <description><p>Azzi Fudd falls two spots to fourth overall in the final 2026 WNBA Draft mock ahead of Monday's draft, while Valencia center Awa Fam remains entrenched at No. 1, according to The Athletic. </p>
<p>Fudd's slide follows a challenging NCAA Tournament in which she struggled to generate offense when her jump shot wasn't working, particularly against South Carolina. The Washington Mystics still select her fourth overall, citing her elite shooting ability as she connected on 45 percent of her three-pointers this season, and her growth as a defensive player.</p>
<p>Dallas retains the top pick and is projected to select Fam, who at roughly three years younger than UCLA's Lauren Betts, carries greater long-term upside despite Betts' superior current skill level. Fam's athleticism, shooting touch, and ability to read the floor make her a natural long-term partner alongside Paige Bueckers.</p>
<p>Betts, the Final Four's Most Outstanding Player, slides to Minnesota at No. 2. She averaged 21 points, 9.3 rebounds, and 2.8 blocks while shooting 68.8 percent from the field across six tournament games.</p>
<p>TCU's Olivia Miles holds at No. 3 to Seattle.</p>
<p>"There's like half a dozen people in the world that have her vision that can process it that quickly, that can throw a one-handed bounce pass to the opposite corner, off the dribble, on a laser and then do it with their left hand," said TCU head coach Mark Campbell. </p>
<p>UCLA wing Gabriela Jaquez rises three spots to No. 7 to Portland after posting 21 points, 10 rebounds, and five assists in the national title game. South Carolina's Ta'Niya Latson climbs to No. 8 after a strong tournament showing.</p>
<p>Toronto, picking sixth after winning the offseason coin flip, selects Spanish guard Iyana Martin.</p>
<h2>The Athletic's Final 2026 WNBA Mock Draft</h2>
<p>1. Dallas Wings: Awa Fam, C, Valencia (Spain)<br />2. Minnesota Lynx (from Chicago Sky): Lauren Betts, C, UCLA<br />3. Seattle Storm (from LA Sparks): Olivia Miles, G, TCU<br />4. Washington Mystics: Azzi Fudd, G, UConn<br />5. Chicago Sky (from Connecticut Sun): Kiki Rice, G, UCLA<br />6. Toronto Tempo: Iyana Martin, G, Avenida (Spain)<br />7. Portland Fire: Gabriela Jaquez, F, UCLA<br />8. Golden State Valkyries: Ta'Niya Latson, G, South Carolina<br />9. Washington Mystics (from Seattle Storm): Flau'jae Johnson, G, LSU<br />10. Indiana Fever: Raven Johnson, G, South Carolina<br />11. Washington Mystics (from NY Liberty via Connecticut Sun): Frieda Buhner, G, Movistar Estudiantes (Spain)<br />12. Connecticut Sun (from Phoenix Mercury): Nell Angloma, G, Lattes Montpellier (France)<br />13. Atlanta Dream: Gianna Kneepkens, G, UCLA<br />14. Seattle Storm (from Las Vegas Aces): Cotie McMahon, G/F, Ole Miss<br />15. Connecticut Sun (from Minnesota Lynx via Washington Mystics): Madina Okot, C, South Carolina</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 07:11:00 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285027/Azzi-Fudd-Slides-To-No-4-In-Final-WNBA-Mock-Draft;-Awa-Fam-Holds-Top-Spot</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Fudd_Azzi_uconn_260404.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Billy Donovan On Coaching Future: 'Everyone's Got To Look Out For What Is Best For The Bulls'</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285026/Billy-Donovan-On-Coaching-Future-Everyones-Got-To-Look-Out-For-What-Is-Best-For-The-Bulls</link>
      <description><p>Chicago Bulls head coach Billy Donovan responded to team president and CEO Michael Reinsdorf's endorsement that he wants Donovan to remain with the team for next season.</p>
<p>"I think Michael was making the point of how he felt about me," Donovan said on Thursday. "But I also understand that, like I said, everybody's got to look out for what is best for the Bulls at that point in time."</p>
<p>The <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284943/Bulls-Fire-Arturas-Karnisovas-Marc-Eversley-From-Front-Office-Roles">Bulls fired</a> VP of basketball operations Arturas Karnisovas and GM Marc Eversley earlier in the week.</p>
<p>Reinsdorf made it known that a future general manager must commit to keeping Donovan as head coach.</p>
<p>"If I interview someone and they're not sold on Billy, they're not sold on a Hall of Fame coach," <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284986/Bulls-Prioritize-Retaining-Billy-Donovan-As-Part-Of-Next-GM-Search">Reinsdorf said</a>. "If Billy wants to be our coach and someone's not interested in that, then they're probably not the right candidate for us."</p>
<p>The 60-year-old has yet to decide on his future and plans to meet with Reinsdorf after the season.</p>
<p>"I love it here," Donovan said. "I've loved the relationship piece. Not only Jerry and Michael, but the people in the building, the staff. It's been an awesome working environment, and I enjoy it. But we're at this place because we really haven't won a lot."</p>
<p>Donovan is set to finish his sixth season with the Bulls.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 01:43:31 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285026/Billy-Donovan-On-Coaching-Future-Everyones-Got-To-Look-Out-For-What-Is-Best-For-The-Bulls</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Donovan_Billy_chi_240410.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Alex Sarr Likely Out For Season With Toe Injury</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285025/Alex-Sarr-Likely-Out-For-Season-With-Toe-Injury</link>
      <description><p>Washington Wizards forward Alex Sarr is likely to miss the team's final three games of the season with a toe injury, head coach Brian Keefe said on Thursday.</p>
<p>Sarr has missed the past six games with capsulitis in his left big toe.</p>
<p>"It's probably unlikely that he comes back with the short amount of time that we have here," Keefe said on Thursday.</p>
<p>Sarr averaged 16.3 points and 7.4 rebounds in 48 games this season.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 01:30:23 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285025/Alex-Sarr-Likely-Out-For-Season-With-Toe-Injury</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Sarr_Alex_was_241028.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Dink Pate Commits To Providence</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285024/Dink-Pate-Commits-To-Providence</link>
      <description><p>Dink Pate of the G League's Westchester Knicks committed to Providence on Thursday, his agent told ESPN.</p>
<p>Pate was a top-30 recruit in the 2023 class before opting to play for the G League Ignite.</p>
<p>Pate averaged 16.8 points and 6.7 rebounds at Westchester last season.</p>
<p>Providence also secured a commitment from transfer Miles Byrd, who was the Mountain West Defensive Player of the Year.</p>
<p>The two players represent statement recruits for new coach Bryan Hodgson, who took over the job last month. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Apr 2026 01:17:39 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/285024/Dink-Pate-Commits-To-Providence</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Logo_Providence.jpg" />
   </item>
